Class AbstractCommand

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.cmd.AbstractCommand

ICommand
Direct Known Subclasses:

AddRequestBodyDefinitionCommand, AddResponseCommand, AddResponseDefinitionCommand, AddResponseHeaderCommand, AddSchemaDefinitionCommand, AddSchemaPropertyCommand, AddSecurityRequirementCommand, AddSecuritySchemeCommand, AddServerCommand, AddServerVariableCommand, AddTagCommand, AggregateCommand, ChangeContactCommand, ChangeDescriptionCommand, ChangeExtensionCommand, ChangeLicenseCommand, ChangeMediaTypeSchemaCommand, ChangePropertyCommand, ChangeTitleCommand, ChangeVersionCommand, CreateOperationCommand, CreatePathCommand, CreateSchemaCommand, DeleteAllExamplesCommand, DeleteAllExtensionsCommand, DeleteAllHeadersCommand, DeleteAllOperationsCommand, DeleteAllParametersCommand, DeleteAllPropertiesCommand, DeleteAllSecurityRequirementsCommand, DeleteAllSecuritySchemesCommand, DeleteAllServersCommand, DeleteAllTagsCommand, DeleteCallbackCommand, DeleteExampleDefinitionCommand, DeleteExtensionCommand, DeleteHeaderDefinitionCommand, DeleteLinkCommand, DeleteMediaTypeCommand, DeleteNodeCommand, DeleteOperationCommand, DeleteOperationSecurityRequirementCommand, DeleteParameterCommand, DeleteParameterDefinitionCommand, DeletePathCommand, DeleteRequestBodyCommand, DeleteRequestBodyDefinitionCommand, DeleteResponseCommand, DeleteResponseHeaderCommand, DeleteSchemaCommand, DeleteSchemaPropertyCommand, DeleteSecurityRequirementCommand, DeleteSecuritySchemeCommand, DeleteServerCommand, DeleteServerVariableCommand, DeleteTagCommand, EnsureChildNodeCommand, RefactorCallbackDefinitionCommand, RefactorExampleDefinitionCommand, RefactorHeaderDefinitionCommand, RefactorLinkDefinitionCommand, RefactorParameterDefinitionCommand, RefactorRequestBodyDefinitionCommand, RefactorResponseDefinitionCommand, RefactorSchemaDefinitionCommand, RenameTagCommand, ReplaceSecurityRequirementCommand, SetExternalDocsCommand, UpdateNodeCommand, UpdateSecuritySchemeCommand
public abstract class AbstractCommand extends Object implements ICommand
A base class for all command implementations.
Author:
eric.wittmann@gmail.com
